info.description: This site documents the endpoints for the smaash web app, allowing easy testing
info.title: SMAASH API documentation

parameters.description: dto for logging in a user
parameters.name: user_login_dto

200.description: returns the id of the logged in user

parameters.description: dto for creating a new user
parameters.name: user_create_dto

parameters.description: dto for creating a new category
parameters.name: category_create_dto

get.description: Reads a category by it's id

parameters.description: the id of the desired category
parameters.name: id

put.description: Updates the category with the given id

400.description: id from url and id from request body doesn't match

delete.description: Deletes a category with the given id

post.description: Logs a user into the game

parameters.description: dto for logging in a user
parameters.name: user_login_dto

200.description: returns the id of the logged in user

parameters.description: dto for asking fo a refresh token
parameters.name: user_login_dto

200.description: returns the new access and refresh tokens

parameters.description: dto for creating a new level
parameters.name: level_create_dto

get.description: Reads a level by it's id

parameters.description: the id of the desired level
parameters.name: id

put.description: Updates the level with the given id

400.description: id from url and id from request body doesn't match

delete.description: Deletes a level with the given id

parameters.description: dto for creating a new profile
parameters.name: profile_create_dto

get.description: Reads a user by it's id

parameters.description: the id of the desired profile
parameters.name: id

put.description: Updates the profile with the given id

400.description: id from url and id from request body doesn't match

delete.description: Deletes a profile with the given id

201.description: returns newly created profile picture's URI

parameters.description: dto for creating a new role
parameters.name: role_create_dto

get.description: Reads a role by it's id

parameters.description: the id of the desired role
parameters.name: id

put.description: Updates the role with the given id

400.description: id from url and id from request body doesn't match

delete.description: Deletes a role with the given id

200.description: returns the user with the given id

404.description: User with given ID not found

put.description: Updates the user with the given id. (Cannot modify the users password)

400.description: id from url and id from request body doesn't match

delete.description: Deletes a user with the given id

get.description: Reads all profiles of a given user

parameters.description: ID of the user whose profiles you attempt to fetch
parameters.name: user_id

201.description: returns profiles of the given user

404.description: user with given ID not found

post.description: Creates a new profile for a given user

parameters.description: dto for creating a new profile for a given user
parameters.name: profile_append_dto

parameters.description: ID of the user to whose profiles you attempt to append
parameters.name: user_id

404.description: user with given ID not found
